prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 11925→13470→13831→15799→12651，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024 年大幅后移至 15799 后，2025 年显著回弹至 12651，近 2 年波动幅度约 3148 名，2025 年基准约 12651 名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 57→58→59→61→61 人，逐年小幅递增；2026 年计划 66 人，较 2025 年扩招约 8.2%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字相应后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名 2026 年约第 63 名，近年排名稳定在 60–65 区间，属中上水平 211；声誉文件中无河海大学负面记录，近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第 52（较热），综合热度约 62.6 万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏上水平，反映报考关注度温和上升；未见明显投档断档记录；水利工程 A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程 A、环境科学与工程 A，均为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的水利类、土木工程、环境科学等直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 及其自动化等持续高热推荐，河海大学相关专业（计算机、软件、电气、自动化等）受益于行业热度；土木建筑专业热度分化观望至明显劝退，可能对土木工程等专业报考产生一 定抑制；本省 2026 年物理类考生估算约 13.69 万人，较 2025 年（13.95 万）略降约 1.9%，竞争压力略有缓解；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对西南地区考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在重庆招生占 比约 2.5%（2025 年数据），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好无明显异常。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次回弹至 12651 的走势、2026 年扩招约 8.2% 的供需压力、以及本省物理类考生略降约 1.9% 的缓解效应；考虑 2025 年位次反弹后基数较低、扩招幅度较大但考生略减，预计 2026 年最低位次约 13223 名，较 2025 年小幅后移约 572 名，区间 12723–13723 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 12723–13723 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<12723 名）可重点冲击水利类（大禹班）、计算机等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>13723 名）建议以三档专业为主、二档为辅，确保录取。河海大学水利工程为全国顶尖 A+ 学科，相关专业就业竞争力强，值得优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11925→13470→13831→15799→12651, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. After a significant backward shift to 15799 in 2024, it rebounded notably to 12651 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 3148 places in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 12651. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing from 2021 to 2025 was 57→58→59→61→61 persons, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 66 persons, an expansion of about 8.2% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and shifts the ranking numbers backward accordingly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. There are no negative records of Hohai University in reputation documents, and its reputation has been stable in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting a moderate increase in application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all of which are the university's flagship disciplines, directly corresponding to majors such as Water Resources, Civil Engineering, and Environmental Science in the enrollment plan, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended. Related majors at Hohai University (Computer Science, Software, Electrical Engineering, Automation, etc.) benefit from industry popularity. The popularity of Civil Engineering and Architecture majors is diverging from observation to obvious discouragement, which may suppress applications for majors like Civil Engineering to some extent. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 136,900, a slight decrease of about 1.9% compared to 2025 (139,500), slightly easing competition pressure. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the Southwest region. The university's enrollment share in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025 data), which is at a moderately low level, with no obvious regional preference anomalies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking to 12651, the supply-demand pressure of an 8.2% expansion in 2026, and the easing effect of a slight decrease of about 1.9% in Physics Category candidates in the province; taking into account the low base after the 2025 ranking rebound, the relatively large expansion but slight decrease in candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 13223, a slight backward shift of about 572 places compared to 2025, with a range of 12723–13723.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Water Resources (Dayu Intensive Class/Dayu Direct Promotion Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Automation
- Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering
- Smart Water Resources
- Mathematics
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Geological Engineering
- Safety Engineering
- Agricultural Water Resources Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12723–13723, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<12723), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Water Resources (Dayu Class) and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>13723), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, to ensure admission. Hohai University's Water Resources Engineering is a top A+ discipline in China, and related majors have strong employment competitiveness, making them worth prioritizing.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 2629→2882→2755→2933→2943，整体呈缓慢后移趋势，近 3 年稳定在 2755–2943 区间，2025 年基准约 2943 名；该校在重庆历史类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 5→4→4→4→4 人，2025 年为 4 人；2026 年计划仅 2 人，较 2025 年缩招 50%，缩招幅度极大，使竞争显著加剧，位次数字大幅前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名 2026 年约第 63 名，近年排名稳定；声誉平稳，无负面记录；抖音热度排名第 52（较热），综合热度中等偏上；未见投档断档记录；水利工程 A+、土木工程 A、环境科学与工程 A，但历史类招生专业（英语、广播电视学、会计学）与上述工科优势学科无直接关联，学科评估对历史类专业报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，会计 学热度分化观望至推荐（考公优势），英语/外语类专业热度一般观望；本省 2026 年历史类考生估算约 7.21 万人，较 2025 年（7.34 万）略降约 1.7%，竞争压力略有缓解；河海大学位于江苏南京，对西南地区历史类考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在重庆历史类招生占比极低 （约 0.1%），缩招后占比进一步下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2943 名、2026 年历史类计划从 4 人骤降至 2 人（缩招 50%）的强烈供需冲击；考虑本省历史类考生略降约 1.7% 的微弱缓解效应，预计 2026 年最低位次约 2090 名，较 2025 年大幅前移约 853 名，区间 1714–2466 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1714–2466 名内，历史类仅 2 个招生专业（英语产教融合卓越班 2 人），选择空间极为有限。位次明显优于区间下限（<1714 名）可冲击会计学（智能会计培优班）；位次接近区间上限（>2466 名）需谨慎评估录取风险。建议同时关注其他同层次 211 高校的历史类招生计划作为备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2629→2882→2755→2933→2943, showing a slow backward trend overall. In the past 3 years, it stabilized in the range of 2755–2943, with the 2025 baseline around 2943. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing from 2021 to 2025 was 5→4→4→4→4 students, with 4 students in 2025. The 2026 plan is only 2 students, a 50% reduction compared to 2025, which is a significant contraction, sharply increasing competition and causing the ranking number to move forward substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. Reputation is stable with no negative records; Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with overall medium-high popularity. No record of admission gaps. Water Conservancy Engineering is A+, Civil Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, but the History Category enrollment majors (English, Radio and Television, Accounting) are not directly related to the above engineering advantages, so the discipline evaluation has limited impact on History Category applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category enrollment majors, Accounting popularity is divided between wait-and-see and recommended (advantage for civil service exams), English/foreign language majors have average wait-and-see popularity. The estimated number of History Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 72,100, a slight decrease of about 1.7% from 2025 (73,400), slightly easing competition pressure. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which has some cross-provincial appeal for History Category examinees in the southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion for History Category in Chongqing is extremely low (about 0.1%), and it further decreases after the reduction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2943 and the strong supply-demand impact of the 2026 History Category plan dropping sharply from 4 to 2 students (a 50% reduction), and considering the slight easing effect of a 1.7% decrease in provincial History Category examinees, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to be about 2090, moving forward significantly by about 853 places compared to 2025, with a range of 1714–2466.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Accounting (Intelligent Accounting Excellence Class)
- English (Global Competence and International Water Ecological Civilization Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other History Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Radio and Television
- English (Regular Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 1714–2466, there are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category (English Industry-Education Integration Excellence Class with 2 students), offering extremely limited choices. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1714) can aim for Accounting (Intelligent Accounting Excellence Class); rankings close to the upper limit (>2466) require careful assessment of admission risk. It is recommended to also consider History Category enrollment plans of other 211 universities at the same level as alternatives.
